institution.name: Lebanon County Area Vocational Technical School

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 37 pp at Lebanon County Area Vocational Technical School vs the 2003–2007 baseline (48.3% vs 85.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lebanon County Area Vocational Technical School rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.9k → $12.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lebanon County Area Vocational Technical School fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (114 → 101).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Lebanon County Area Vocational Technical School are 30% above 6-year earnings ($43.2k → $56.4k).
